✓ Ready to Finalize
This saves the order and contract to the app. Send for e-sign next so the customer can sign on their phone — once signed, the contract auto-saves to Google Drive.
Contract Preview
✓ Contract Saved!
Order and contract saved. Now send for e-sign — the signed contract will auto-save to Google Drive once the customer signs.
📱
Send for E-Signature
Bride receives a link, reviews the contract, and signs on her phone. Signature auto-saves.
Or send contract PDF by email
📎 Contract PDF will be attached.
